package rulefixtures

// scenario for stable_value_normalization_in_inner_loop: Stable value normalization (ToLower, TrimSpace, etc.) repeated inside inner loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule366PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario366Positive(records []Rule366PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
